quoteLast: after learning to pitch shelter tents_)
title: At Plattsburg

quoteFirst: He chose the latter, and at
quoteLast: proceeded on a south-westerly course at slow speed.
title: Q-Ships and Their Story

quoteFirst: At 9.50 a.m. started motor and ran it until 0.50 p.m.; and again from
quoteLast: to 5.45 p.m. Notwithstanding our using power, it was 10 p.m. before the light on Cape Mala could be entered in the log as just dipping.
title: The mystery of Easter island: the story of an expedition
author: Routledge, Katherine, 1866-1935
